input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.2.3.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.2.3.1
            TITLE: vehicles with a reclined driving position must have:

            CONTENT:
            rule T.2.3.1: Vehicles with a Reclined Driving Position must have:
T.2.3.1 Vehicles with a Reclined Driving Position must have: 
a. A 6 Point Harness or a 7 Point Harness 
b. Anti-Submarine Belts with tilt lock adjusters (“quick adjusters”) OR two sets of Anti-
Submarine Belts installed.

final_answer: T.2.3.1 Vehicles with a Reclined Driving Position must have: a. A 6 Point Harness or a 7 Point Harness b. Anti-Submarine Belts with tilt lock adjusters (“quick adjusters”) OR two sets of Anti- Submarine Belts installed.
